news.headline: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. announces monthly distribution on Faircourt Fund (NEO:FGX) on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as Manager for the Faircourt Fund (NEO:FGX), has declared the monthly distribution for the Fund's Shares. The announced distribution is scheduled to be paid out to shareholders.

news.headline: Trump to Address Border Security in Texas on Friday at 12:30pm CDT
Sanctuary Medicinals in Gardner to host Halloween Celebration on Oct 26, 11 AM-7 PM at 16 Pearson Blvd, with free local music, art.
news.summary: On October 26th, 2024, Sanctuary Medicinals in Gardner, Massachusetts invites the public to its Halloween Celebration from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM at 16 Pearson Boulevard. The event is free and features local music, art, and fall-themed activities.

Grupo Comercial Chedraui, S.A.B. de C.V. reports 4.9% growth in Same Store Sales for Q3 2024 under IFRS standards.
news.summary: In Mexico City on October 23, 2024, Grupo Comercial Chedraui, S.A.B. de C.V. released its third quarter results for 2024. The figures are presented in nominal terms and follow International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS). Key highlights for the third quarter of 2024 include a 4.9% growth in Same Store Sales (SSS).

news.headline: PL Developments reports early tender results for its exchange offer, aiming to exchange $350 million in aggregate principal.
news.summary: In Westbury, New York, on October 23, 2024, P & L Development Holdings, LLC ("PLD") shared the initial participation outcomes of its subsidiaries' Exchange Offer. The offer involves swapping up to $350 million in total principal.

news.headline: BTC bullish per Tudor-Jones, GOAT at $750M. Saylor to gift BTC, India mulls crypto ban for CBDC. Metaplanet raises $66m, and Peter Todd hides. SEC prioritizes crypto inspections in 2025. SOL surpasses ETH in fees. AVAX debuts debit card, Nigeria drops Binance exec charges, Vitalik pens about The Verge's future, Buenos Aires unveils ZK ID, Azura launches DeFi platform, Farcaster earns $10k, LINK reveals private transactions.
news.summary: Prominent figures in the cryptocurrency world are making headlines this week. Investor Tudor-Jones advocates for owning Bitcoin amid rising inflation concerns. Michael Saylor announces plans to donate Bitcoin to benefit society. Meanwhile, India is contemplating a ban on cryptocurrencies in favor of a central bank digital currency. Metaplanet secures $66 million in funding, with intentions to invest in Bitcoin. Peter Todd retreats from the public eye following claims about being Satoshi. The SEC reveals plans to prioritize crypto oversight by 2025. Solana surpasses Ethereum in 24-hour transaction fees once more. Avalanche introduces a debit card for crypto payments. Nigeria withdraws charges against a Binance executive. Vitalik Buterin shares insights on Ethereum's future in relation to The Verge. Buenos Aires implements a decentralized zero-knowledge identification solution. Azura launches a DeFi trading platform, as Farcaster reports a modest $10k revenue in October. Chainlink introduces private transaction capabilities in their network.

news.headline: L.A. Times' editorial chief resigns as owner blocks Harris endorsement. Board ready to endorse, but Soon-Shiong stops at presidential race.
news.summary: Mariel Garza mentioned that the editorial board was ready to support Kamala Harris for president, however, the paper's owner, Patrick Soon-Shiong, opted against endorsing any candidate for the presidential race.

news.headline: PAC Worldwide launches Polyjacket® with 100% recycled content at PACK EXPO, featuring PCR and PIR forms.
news.summary: Seattle-based PAC Worldwide Corporation has unveiled a new advancement in flat poly mailers to meet the growing demand from couriers and e-commerce companies. The latest offering, Polyjacket®, is crafted from 100% recycled materials, with options including 100% post-consumer resin (PCR) and certified to the Recycled Claim Standard (RCS), as well as 100% post-industrial recycled (PIR) forms. This eco-friendly innovation is being launched at PACK EXPO in Chicago and is expected to further boost the popularity of flat poly mailers in the industry.

news.headline: ServiceNow beats Q3 earnings estimates; stock dips with underwhelming guidance. Names Google COO.
news.summary: ServiceNow's stock experienced a decline following the release of their Q3 earnings report, which surpassed expectations, yet the provided guidance did not meet investors' expectations. In addition to this, the enterprise software company appointed a new Chief Operating Officer who previously worked at Google. The post from Investor's Business Daily highlighted these updates without specifying the source.

news.headline: Tesla Q3 earnings rose 9%, revenue lagged. Elon Musk optimistic, stock surged. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: In the third quarter, Tesla reported a surprising 9% increase in earnings, despite falling short in revenue. Following this news, Tesla's stock experienced a late jump, and CEO Elon Musk expressed optimism during the conference call. This unexpected rise in earnings showcases Tesla's resilience in the market, as investors respond positively to the news.

news.headline: Daiso opens new store in Vacaville, Calif at Nut Tree on Nov 2. Renowned retail chain with affordable products.
news.summary: In Vacaville, California, Daiso, the popular global retail chain known for its affordable and diverse products, will be celebrating the grand opening of its new store at Nut Tree on November 2nd, 2024. The store opening marks an exciting expansion for Daiso in the region, offering residents access to their range of unique items.

news.headline: Tribe Payments opens Singapore office for APAC expansion, appoints Matt to lead; commitment to global payment solutions.
news.summary: Tribe Payments, a leading digital payments and infrastructure orchestrator focusing on issuer and acquirer processing, has recently inaugurated its Singapore office as part of a strategic move to expand into the Asia-Pacific (APAC) region. This development highlights Tribe's dedication to providing top-tier digital payment solutions globally. In a bid to spearhead operations in this vibrant region, payments expert Matt has been appointed by Tribe.

news.headline: Daiso announces new store opening in San Antonio, Texas on November 2nd at Westover Marketplace.
news.summary: A popular worldwide retail chain, Daiso, known for its diverse and cost-effective product selection, is excited to unveil its newest location at Westover Marketplace in San Antonio, Texas. The grand opening is scheduled for November 2nd, 2024, offering local residents access to a variety of unique items at affordable prices.

news.headline: UC receives over $4 billion in donations, says CFO.
LAT editorial chief resigns as owner blocks Kamala Harris endorsement. Board ready to endorse Harris, but Soon-Shiong vetoed.
news.summary: Mariel Garza mentioned that the editorial board was ready to support Kamala Harris for the presidential race, but the paper's owner, Patrick Soon-Shiong, opted against making any endorsement.

news.headline: Spirit AeroSystems reported Q3 2024 revenues of $1.5 billion with EPS of $(4.07). Cash used in operations was $276 million.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc. reported revenues of $1.5 billion. The earnings per share (EPS) were $(4.07), with adjusted EPS at $(3.03). Operations required $276 million in cash, resulting in a free cash flow usage of $323 million. Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc., traded on the NYSE under the symbol SPR, is based in Wichita, Kansas.

news.headline: Roche's Q3 sales hit 15.14 billion Swiss francs, led by Ocrevus and Vabysmo. Urges regulators to block $16.5B Catalent acquisition.
news.summary: Roche Holdings AG (OTC:RHHBY) reported a 9% year-over-year increase in third-quarter sales, reaching 15.14 billion Swiss francs (~$17.5 billion). The pharmaceuticals division contributed 11.62 billion Swiss francs to total sales. Leading the sales was Ocrevus, a multiple sclerosis drug, with a revenue growth of 11% to 1.69 billion Swiss francs. Sales of Vabysmo, an age-related macular degeneration treatment, saw a significant surge of 59% year over year, totaling 1.02 billion Swiss francs. Roche reaffirmed its business outlook, projecting mid-single-digit growth in group sales and high-single-digit growth in core earnings-per-share. The company halted a mid-stage chronic cough program, RG6341, and terminated a Phase 3 trial for divarasib in the second-line treatment of non-small cell lung cancer.

news.headline: Boston Scientific halts FARAPULSE study enrollment; AVANT GUARD trial in Dec 2023 for first-line AFib treatment with PFA System vs AAD therapy.
news.summary: Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) launched the AVANT GUARD trial in December 2023 to assess the safety and efficacy of the FARAPULSE Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) System as a primary treatment for persistent atrial fibrillation (AF). This type of AFib involves irregular heart rhythms lasting over a week. The trial is unique in studying the use of PFA as a first-line therapy for patients with this AF form. It will compare the outcomes of ablation with the FARAPULSE PFA System, a nonthermal treatment using electric fields to selectively ablate heart tissue, against those of anti-arrhythmic drug (AAD) therapy commonly given to such patients.

news.headline: 2024 race sees Trump and Harris in deadlock, economy in focus

Genomma Lab Internacional reports strong Q3 results: 15.9% increase in net sales to Ps. 5,092.5 million & 82% EPS rise to Ps. 0.66. Focusing on Ps. 1.8 billion cost savings by 2027. Free cash flow at record-high Ps. 2.4 billion, a 68% surge.
news.summary: Genomma Lab Internacional, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV:LAB) reported strong Q3 2024 results, with a 15.9% increase in net sales to Ps. 5,092.5 million compared to Q3 2023. The EPS rose by 82% to Ps. 0.66 and EBITDA margin expanded to 23.7%. The company achieved a record-high free cash flow of Ps. 2.4 billion in the trailing twelve months, marking a 68% increase. Genomma aims to achieve Ps. 1.8 billion in annual cost savings by 2027 while focusing on strengthening core brands. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Catch the documentary "The Prosperity Predicament" on Bloomberg TV at 8 PM tonight.
Wiley represents Coalition in filing critical circumstances allegations against Chinese LSPTV imports after surge in imports post AD/CVD petitions in June 2024.
news.summary: In response to a significant increase in imports, the American Personal Transportation Vehicle Manufacturers Coalition (Coalition) has taken action. Critically, circumstances allegations were filed by the Coalition, represented by Wiley Rein LLP, in October 2024. This move followed the filing of anti-dumping/countervailing duty petitions in June 2024. The surge in imports has prompted this strategic response to address the situation.

news.headline: Northrim BanCorp reported $8.8M net income, $1.57 per diluted share in Q3 2024, lower than Q2 but higher YoY.
news.summary: In its recent financial report, Northrim BanCorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: NRIM) based in Anchorage, Alaska, revealed a net income of $8.8 million, equivalent to $1.57 per diluted share for the third quarter of 2024. This marks a slight decrease from the $9.0 million reported in the second quarter of the same year, where earnings were $1.62 per diluted share. In comparison to the third quarter of the previous year, with earnings of $8.4 million or $1.48 per diluted share, there was a noticeable improvement in profitability. This upturn is attributed to a rise in mortgage banking income and increased net interest income. However, the positive impact was dampened by elevated other operating expenses and a higher provision for credit losses during this quarter.

news.headline: Northfield Bancorp, Inc. reported Q3 2024 net income of $6.5M ($0.16/share) compared to $6.0M in Q2, with $5.1M decrease in deposits and $27.2M decrease in loan balances. Non-performing loans increased to 0.75% of total loans. The company also declared a cash dividend of $0.13 per share. Total assets increased to $5.73B. The company repurchased 560,683 shares for $6.3M. Liquidity stands at $597M in securities and $699M in available loans.
news.summary: Northfield Bancorp, the holding company for Northfield Bank, reported diluted earnings per share of $0.16 for the quarter ended September 30, 2024, compared to $0.14 for the prior quarter and $0.19 for the same quarter in 2023. Net interest margin remained at 2.08%, and deposits decreased by $5.1 million from June 30, 2024. Loan balances declined by $27.2 million. Non-performing loans increased to 0.75% of total loans from 0.42% in the prior quarter. The company repurchased 560,683 shares for $6.3 million. A cash dividend of $0.13 per share was declared for stockholders. Total assets increased to $5.73 billion, and total liabilities increased to $5.03 billion. Non-performing assets increased to $30.4 million. Accruing loans 30-89 days delinquent increased to $16.1 million. Non-performing loans and assets to total loans were 0.75% and 0.53% respectively. The company maintains sufficient liquidity with $232.9 million in cash and cash equivalents. Their CBLR ratios were 12.03% and 12.26%. The primary sources of liquidity were cash, corporate bonds, and mortgage securities. Stockholders' equity increased to $699.6 million. Non-accrual loans increased to $27.8 million. Delinquent loans increased to $16.1 million. The company had $286.7 million in rent-regulated multifamily loans with 39.1% subject to regulation. Additionally, the company had PCD loans totaling $9.3 million.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls; Disney stock drops after CEO replacement plan revealed. Nvidia hits record, Boeing rises.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline on the stock market, with Walt Disney disclosing information about the replacement of CEO Bob Iger. Notably, Nvidia achieved a new all-time high and Boeing also saw a significant increase in its stock value. These developments were featured in a live coverage post titled "Dow Jones Falls, Disney Skids Amid Bob Iger Replacement Plan; Nvidia Hits Record After This."

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 344 points, Nvidia stock hits new highs.
news.summary: On Monday, Dow Jones futures dropped by 344 points as the Dow Jones industrial average saw a decline. In contrast, Nvidia stock surged to achieve new record highs. This news comes in the wake of market fluctuation, highlighting the contrasting fortunes of these two entities.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops as Trump stock triples, Tesla falls before earnings. Warren Buffett warns investors.
news.summary: Today, there was a decline in the Dow Jones on the stock market. Warren Buffett gave a cautionary statement to investors. A stock associated with Donald Trump experienced a significant increase, tripling in value and reaching a crucial level. Additionally, Tesla's upcoming earnings report is anticipated. Elon Musk, the CEO of Tesla, is expected to provide insight during the earnings call.

news.headline: Tesla's stock soars after earnings rise, Elon Musk positivity. Market sells off as Treasury yields increase.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the stock market experienced a significant decline due to a continuous increase in Treasury yields. Surprisingly, Tesla's earnings saw a positive spike, which led to a boost in share prices, particularly after Elon Musk expressed optimism. The Dow Jones Futures' post highlights the soaring performance of Tesla following the positive earnings report and Musk's outlook. The article also raises the question of the affordability of Tesla's upcoming electric vehicle.

news.headline: US Election expected to boost crypto engagement, according to Bloomberg.
New Zealand plans to welcome philanthropists to its social fund in the future.
Former Trump Chief of Staff sends warning; watch on Bloomberg for impact.

Gold Resource Corporation reports selling 1,357 oz of gold, 181,434 oz of silver in Q3. Total AuEq oz at 3,526. Sold 1,473 tonnes of zinc, 98 tonnes of copper, and 467 tonnes of lead. Sold 15,325 AuEq oz, 4,926 tonnes of zinc, 559 tonnes of copper during 9 months ending September 30, 2024.
news.summary: Gold Resource Corporation (NYSE American: GORO) has released its initial third-quarter figures, revealing the sale of 1,357 ounces of gold and 181,434 ounces of silver, totaling 3,526 gold equivalent (AuEq) ounces. Moreover, the company sold 1,473 tonnes of zinc, 98 tonnes of copper, and 467 tonnes of lead during this period. In the nine months leading up to September 30, 2024, the company managed to sell 15,325 AuEq ounces, 4,926 tonnes of zinc, and 559 tonnes of copper.

news.headline: SK hynix reports record revenues of 17.5731T won in Q3 2024, with operating profit of 7.03T won and net profit of 5.7534T won.
news.summary: The company has reported record-breaking financial results with revenues reaching 17.5731 trillion won, operating profit hitting 7.03 trillion won, and net profit at 5.7534 trillion won. This marks their best-ever quarterly performance, driven by a surge in high value-added product sales leveraging their leading AI Memory technology. The increase in demand for memory for AI applications has contributed significantly to these impressive numbers.

news.headline: Mercer International Inc. prices $200 million senior notes offering at 12.875% due 2028.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Mercer International Inc. (Nasdaq: MERC) disclosed that they have successfully priced a private offering. This offering consists of $200 million worth of 12.875% senior notes set to mature on October 1, 2028. The Additional Notes were part of this announcement by the Company.

BOK: Changes to be Addressed in November GDP Forecasts
MediciNova updates Phase 2/3 clinical trial of MN-166 in ALS patients at 2024 NEALS Meeting. Lead Investigator discusses progress.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, MediciNova, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ (MNOV) and the Tokyo Stock Exchange (Code Number: 4875), shared updates at the NEALS Meeting. The lead Principal Investigator, Björn Oskarsson, MD, FAAN, presented progress on the Phase 2/3 clinical trial of MN-166 (ibudilast) for Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) patients during the virtual event held from October 21-24, 2024.

South Korea's 3Q GDP Expands 1.5% Year on Year, Missing Estimates
Ex-CEO of Celsius to appear in court on Nov. 13 per Judge Koeltl's order regarding fraud charges.
news.summary: A court hearing has been scheduled by Judge John Koeltl on Nov. 13 for Alex Mashinsky, ex-CEO of Celsius, and prosecutors to discuss the motion filed by Mashinsky to dismiss fraud and market manipulation charges.

news.headline: Lockheed Martin's Q3 report included $2.1 billion in free cash flow, with Missiles and Fire Control segment showing 8% revenue growth. Analyst cautious about growth outlook.
news.summary: Lockheed Martin Corp. released their third-quarter results before trading on Tuesday, with NYSE:LMT showing a mixed performance. The company fell short of the consensus revenue estimate, but exceeded expectations on the bottom line. Analyst Ken Herbert from RBC Capital Markets provided insights into the report, focusing on Lockheed Martin's Missiles and Fire Control (MFC) segment. This segment saw an impressive 8% increase in revenue year-over-year, coupled with a 15% rise in operating income. MFC led the growth in sales and operating profit, with Herbert noting it as a highlight for the potential outlook leading up to 2025. Noteworthy was the company's free cash flow of $2.1 billion. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ProLux Energy and Powur partner for growth in solar market, focusing on Illinois and Arizona to boost sales.
news.summary: Powur, a company based in Carlsbad, California, has announced a partnership with ProLux Energy to expand their presence in Illinois and Arizona. This collaboration aims to utilize Powur's platform to enhance operations efficiency and increase solar sales in these states.
